title: Datapack on Titan - RESOURCE PACK
description: This is the necessary resource pack for the Datapack on Titan datapack
body:
This resource pack is responsible for all the visuals in its corresponding datapack, found [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/datapack-on-titan)!

Below are some showcase videos, with more information:
